recommendations.title: Vampyros Lesbos
recommendations.overview: An erotic horror tale about a vixen vampiress seducing and killing women to appease her insatiable thirst for female blood.

recommendations.title: The Bakery Girl of Monceau
recommendations.overview: Early new wave effort from Rohmer, which was the first of his six moral tales. It concerns a young man who approaches a girl in the street, but after several days without seeing her again, he becomes involved with the girl in the local bakery. Eventu

recommendations.title: Portrait of a Lady on Fire
recommendations.overview: On an isolated island in Brittany at the end of the eighteenth century, a female painter is obliged to paint a wedding portrait of a young woman.

recommendations.title: Sleeping Beauty
recommendations.overview: A haunting erotic fairytale about Lucy, a young University student drawn into a mysterious hidden world of beauty and desire.

recommendations.title: Ran
recommendations.overview: Shakespeare's King Lear is reimagined as a singular historical epic set in sixteenth-century Japan where an aging warlord divides his kingdom between his three sons.

recommendations.title: Agora
recommendations.overview: A historical drama set in Roman Egypt, concerning philosopher Hypatia of Alexandria and her relationship with her slave Davus, who is torn between his love for her and the possibility of gaining his freedom by joining the rising tide of Christianity.

recommendations.title: The Earrings of Madame de...
recommendations.overview: In late 19th century France, the Countess Louise, wife of a wealthy general, sells the earrings her husband gave her on their wedding day to pay off her secret debts, then claims to have lost them. Her husband quickly learns of the deceit, which is t

recommendations.title: What's Eating Gilbert Grape
recommendations.overview: Gilbert Grape is a small-town young man with a lot of responsibility. Chief among his concerns are his mother, who is so overweight that she can't leave the house, and his mentally impaired younger brother, Arnie, who has a knack for finding trouble.

recommendations.title: Wild Orchid
recommendations.overview: A woman lawyer becomes mesmerized by a self-made millionaire during an encounter in Rio setting off a series of erotic encounters.

recommendations.title: The Ornithologist
recommendations.overview: Stranded along a sublime river fjord in northern Portugal, an ornithologist is subjected to a series of brutal and erotic Stations-of-the-Cross-style tests.
